“It is not a pleasant thing to think of that which lies ahead for worldly people, for those in all nations who walk in carnal paths, for those in the Church who do not keep the commandments. ‘The time is soon at hand that I shall come in a cloud with power and great glory,’ saith the Lord. ‘And it shall be a great day at the time of my coming, for all nations shall tremble.’ ("D&C 34:7"D&C…
